name: BlueKCGdgCareFaxDispostionFileExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[BKCG_TMP_BlueKCGdgCareFaxDispostionFileExtr];WITH cte1 AS (SELECT C.COMM_SK, C.COMM_ID AS FileIdentifier, C.COMM_FILE_NM AS OriginalFilename, C.COMM_TMPLT_NM AS TemplateName, C.COMM_SENT_DTM AS FilePrintDate, C.COMM_JOB_ID AS JobNumber, null AS DocumentPageCount, C.COMM_STTUS_CD, CAST(C.IMG_ID AS VARCHAR(40)) AS IMG_ID, T.VIEW_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] C INNER JOIN [COMM_TRNSMSN].[dbo].[COMM_TMPLT_RECPNT_TRNSMSN_TYP] T ON C.COMM_TMPLT_NM = T.COMM_TMPLT_RECPNT_TRNSMSN_TYP_NM WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(C.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX)) NOT IN ('File Not Found') AND ((C.COMM_TRGT_SYS_MDUL_CD='RGHTFAX' AND C.COMM_TYP_CD='FAXSTS' AND C.COMM_STTUS_CD IN ('SUCCESS','WARNING','CANCELLED','FAILED')) OR (C.COMM_TRGT_SYS_MDUL_CD='RGHTFAX' AND C.COMM_TYP_CD='ALTRSTAFILE' AND C.COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR'))), cte2 AS (SELECT cte1.*, CASE WHEN cte1.COMM_STTUS_CD='SUCCESS' THEN 'Fax Successful' WHEN cte1.COMM_STTUS_CD='CANCELLED' THEN 'Fax Cancelled' WHEN cte1.COMM_STTUS_CD='WARNING' THEN 'Fax Warning' ELSE 'Fax Failed' END AS Status, 'No provider data was found' AS ErrorMessage FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT cte2.COMM_SK, cte2.FileIdentifier, cte2.OriginalFilename, CASE WHEN cte2.COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN NULL ELSE cte2.FilePrintDate END AS FilePrintDate, cte2.JobNumber, cte2.DocumentPageCount, CASE WHEN cte2.COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN '' ELSE dbo.trim_default(REPLACE('@{pipeline().parameters.PerceptiveURL}', 'replace', cte2.VIEW_ID)) + '%27' + cte2.IMG_ID + '%27>' + cte2.TemplateName + '-' + cte2.Status + '' END AS Link, CASE WHEN cte2.COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN cte2.ErrorMessage ELSE cte2.Status END AS FinalStatus, 'COMMTRNSMSN' AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'ALTRSTA' AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, 'SUCCESS' AS COMM_STTUS_CD, 'FAXDSPSTN' AS COMM_TYP_CD, 'Fax Disposition Successful' AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, GETDATE() AS LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM cte2) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[BKCG_TMP_BlueKCGdgCareFaxDispostionFileExtr] FROM cte3
